CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( DuSieOwner__c ="Du", TEXT(Contact.Salutation) = "Mr." ),
"Lieber " & Contact.FirstName,
IF( AND( DuSieOwner__c ="Du", TEXT(Contact.Salutation) = "Ms." ),
"Liebe " & Contact.FirstName,
IF( AND( DuSieOwner__c ="Sie", TEXT(Contact.Salutation) = "Mr." ),
"Sehr geehrter Herr " & Contact.LastName,
IF( AND( DuSieOwner__c ="Sie", TEXT(Contact.Salutation) = "Ms." ),
"Sehr geehrte Frau " & Contact.LastName,
"" ))))
CustomField.label: Salutation for Letter
